text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the junior G1 Hopeful Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the year, and all these fans are
gathered here at Nakayama Racecourse to find
out who the new star racers will be!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm so excited! Whoever wins here is going
to make her mark on history!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but we all know who we should be keeping
an eye on in next year's Classics!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: It's obviously Biwa Hayahide and Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You hear them? Ticket and Hayahide are all
anyone's talking about.

Winning Ticket and Biwa Hayahide have done
quite well in their races too.

Even as junior-year racers, they run exceptionally
well. It's only natural that expectations are high
for them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And they'll be going head-to-head in the first
Classic Triple Crown race, the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's going on about whether Ticket or
Hayahide will get the first crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: You've gotta show them you're no pushover!
